user.title: Midea ATW Heat Pump
user.description: Choose how to set up your heat pump.

cloud.title: Cloud Login
cloud.description: Enter your Midea cloud credentials to automatically retrieve device details.

select_device.title: Select Device
select_device.description: Choose your heat pump from the devices found in your cloud account.

network.title: LAN Connection
network.description: Enter the local network address of your heat pump.

manual.title: Manual Setup
manual.description: Enter connection details manually. Get token and key using the midea_cli.py tool.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check IP, token, and key.
error.login_failed: Cloud login failed. Check your email, password, and server.
error.no_devices: No heat pump devices (type 0xC3) found in your cloud account.
error.token_failed: Could not retrieve token and key for the selected device.
